title: thunderbird security update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[140.7.0-1.0.1]
- Fix prefs for new nss [Orabug: 37079813]
- Add Oracle prefs

[140.7.0]
- Add OpenELA debranding

[140.7.0-1]
- Update to 140.7.0 ESR
